task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to and view the 'Investment Flow Summary' chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window or tab specifically titled 'Investment Flow Summary' is visible within the JStock application, displaying a graph of the portfolio performance history.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export or save action for the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu (e.g., right-clicking on the chart) or application menu is open with an option like 'Save as...', 'Export to PNG', or 'Save' highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the save dialog with the correct path and filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog is visible, showing the target directory set to 'Documents' (or /home/ga/Documents) and the file name input field containing 'investment_flow.png'.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart was saved to the expected location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal output shows the file 'investment_flow.png' successfully created and present in the 'Documents' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock GUI to generate and save the chart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through JStock menus and save dialogs, rather than using terminal commands (e.g., wget, curl, cp) to download or move a pre-existing image.

integrity.description: The chart reflects the actual portfolio data
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Investment Flow Summary' chart displayed on screen shows genuine data points (reflecting AAPL stock and $15,000 invested capital), not a blank graph or an unrelated stock image.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually spoof the image file
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening an image editor (like GIMP) or renaming an unrelated image file to 'investment_flow.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/investment_flow.png. The JStock portfolio contains synthetically injected data for AAPL stock with $15,000 invested capital; the 'Investment Flow Summary' chart should visually reflect this data.
